channel.title: Weaver & Book Newsletter
channel.description: Monthly notes from an independent bookshop in central Uppsala.

item.title: February reading notes
item.description: Winter picks for the long evenings, a note on the spring author series, and a quiet recommendation from the poetry shelf.

item.title: What we loved in 2025
item.description: Our booksellers look back on a strong year, the titles that moved us, and what to read first in the new year.

item.title: Christmas window and gift picks
item.description: The annual window is up. Wrapped books make the steadiest gifts, and we are happy to set titles aside on request.

item.title: Poetry evening and winter reading
item.description: Notes from the November poetry evening, plus a short list of translated collections worth the dark months.

item.title: Autumn fiction and the season ahead
item.description: New literary fiction has landed. We also open registration for the autumn author readings.

item.title: Back from the Gothenburg Book Fair
item.description: A few titles caught our eye at the fair, including promising debuts we will be ordering for the shop.
